title: amylotheca subumbellata
intro: Amylotheca subumbellata, also known as the yellow fig tree or yellow fig, is a plant species native to New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as reducing the risk of certain cancers. Amylotheca subumbellata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
